overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a high-speed nighttime drive through Night City's neon-lit downtown. The player navigates elevated highways and dense urban canyons surrounded by massive digital billboards, transitioning from open overpasses to a covered highway with illuminated ceiling panels. The scene features heavy cyberpunk aesthetic with vibrant neon signage reflecting off wet asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated cyberpunk highway with neon barriers

events.description: passing the large red BD SHACK neon sign on the right side of the highway
approaching commercial district with denser building signage and overpasses

agents.ego_description: driving at high speed along elevated highway, navigating gentle curves while maintaining lane position

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving ahead in the same lane maintaining steady distance

entered.detail: large rectangular red neon sign with white text mounted on a building facade
concrete safety barrier with continuous red neon strip lighting on top edge
cluster of tall buildings with illuminated windows and scattered neon signage on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an elevated highway at night with the camera driving forward. The distinctive red BD SHACK neon sign dominates the right side as the vehicle approaches and passes it. Red neon strip lights line the highway barriers, and distant skyscrapers are visible against the dark sky. Sparse traffic moves ahead on the wet reflective asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial highway district with overhead billboards

events.description: passing under concrete overpass structure temporarily blocking the sky view
merging into moderate traffic flow while navigating multi-lane highway interchange

agents.ego_description: navigating through commercial area with frequent lane positioning adjustments and passing under overpass structures

notable_agents.action: white sports car overtaking on the right side at high speed

entered.detail: large horizontal white billboard with black text branding mounted on building side
concrete highway overpass passing overhead with support columns visible
tall buildings with illuminated windows and scattered digital advertisements

segments.scene_description: The vehicle transitions from the open highway into a commercial district characterized by overhead billboards and overpasses. The COLOA billboard appears on the left as the camera passes under concrete structures. Traffic density increases with vehicles overtaking and merging, while the surrounding buildings grow taller and more densely packed with signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense downtown urban canyon with digital building facades

events.description: entering dense urban canyon with buildings on both sides completely covered in digital screens
slowing down for traffic congestion at downtown intersection with red traffic light

agents.ego_description: driving through dense neon-lit city center surrounded by towering digital billboards and slowing for traffic signals

notable_agents.action: red sports car braking ahead at the traffic light with brake lights illuminated

entered.detail: large horizontal billboard with product advertisement and portrait imagery
entire building surfaces covered in glowing digital video screens and neon advertisements
glowing green directional signs suspended over the highway indicating routes

segments.scene_description: The scene shifts to a dense urban canyon where buildings on both sides are entirely covered in massive digital billboards and video screens. The DARRA billboard is prominent on the right. The vehicle slows as it approaches congested traffic at an intersection, surrounded by overwhelming neon advertising on every surface creating a tunnel-like effect.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered highway tunnel with illuminated advertising ceiling

events.description: entering covered highway section with illuminated ceiling panels replacing open sky
ceiling panels shifting from blue ocean imagery to orange and yellow illuminated advertisements

agents.ego_description: driving through futuristic covered highway with glowing ceiling advertisements overhead and concrete walls enclosing the route

entered.detail: rectangular light panels covering the entire highway ceiling displaying video advertisements and imagery
concrete walls with vertical neon light strips enclosing the highway on both sides

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions into a futuristic covered highway where the sky is completely replaced by illuminated ceiling panels displaying video advertisements. The environment becomes an enclosed tunnel with concrete walls and vertical neon strips. The lighting shifts from external neon to internal artificial illumination as the vehicle continues through this sheltered corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous high-speed drive through a neon-drenched metropolis that transforms from an open elevated highway into a fully enclosed futuristic corridor. It begins on a wet asphalt overpass dominated by a red BD SHACK sign and distant skyscrapers, with red neon strips guiding the vehicle forward. As the camera moves deeper into the city, the open sky is gradually obscured by concrete overpasses and commercial billboards like the COLOA sign, while the surrounding buildings grow taller and traffic becomes more dense. The scene then shifts into a claustrophobic urban canyon where massive digital screens, including a prominent DARRA billboard, create a tunnel-like effect of overwhelming light. Finally, the environment transitions into a covered highway where the sky is completely replaced by illuminated ceiling panels and vertical neon strips, shifting the lighting from external city glow to internal artificial illumination.
